name: @eventuras/web
description: Main web frontend for Eventuras - participant and organizer interface

APPLICATION_URL.description: Public URL where this application is hosted (e.g., http://localhost:3000). Server-side only.

LOGOUT_URL_REDIRECT.description: URL to redirect to after logout. Server-side only.

DEFAULT_LOCALE.description: Default locale for internationalization (e.g., en-US, nb-NO)

OIDC_ISSUER.description: OIDC provider issuer URL (e.g., https://auth.example.com/application/o/app/). Server-side only – used by server-side PKCE flow.

ORGANIZATION_ID.description: The unique organization ID used to scope API calls. Server-side only – passed as prop to client components.

SITE_SETTINGS_URL.description: Base URL for fetching public site settings and branding configuration. Server-side only.

BACKEND_URL.description: Backend API base URL. Server-side only – passed as prop to client components that need it.

OIDC_CLIENT_ID.description: OIDC client identifier used by the backend authentication flow (server-side only)

OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET.description: OIDC client secret for server-side authentication (never expose to client)

OIDC_API_AUDIENCE.description: OIDC API audience identifier for token validation

OIDC_ROLES_CLAIM.description: Name of the claim in the ID token that contains user roles (default: roles)

SESSION_SECRET.description: Secret key for session encryption (must be a strong random string)

SENTRY_DSN.description: GlitchTip/Sentry DSN. Server-side only — emitted to the browser via an inline <script> in the root layout so the SDK can init without a NEXT_PUBLIC_* build arg.

SENTRY_ENABLED.description: Feature flag for Sentry/GlitchTip reporting. When false (or DSN missing), the SDK is not initialized on client or server.

SENTRY_SEND_DEFAULT_PII.description: Whether the SDK may include default PII (IP, headers) on captured events. Defaults to false on the client and true on the server.
